reviews.review_title: Not for people with hearing loss
reviews.review_description: I love Alice and I love the lofi style of this game, but I have profound hearing loss and it’s pretty upsetting the first task is to recreate a melody on the lever machine.

Before writing this review I went through other comments to try and troubleshoot on my own to make this game work. I tried it with comfort mode off and comfort mode on. With comfort mode off, every time I tried to move, the second I tapped I got taken to the inventory screen. I then tried with comfort mode on, there are no green arrows of any sort. I really feel like this could be a great game. Anything else that I can try??? I was able to open the drawers and play music, only because that is where I started.

developer_response.body: Hi there, we manage to find the problem. The game doesn't have support for the Motion Controller, so when using it the game bugs and you cannot move! Please disable bluetooth or any motion controller and try again! Update: We've fixed it (thanks for the report btw)! Everything should be working fine now, if you'd still like to play our game. Should you like it then, please reconsider your review.

reviews.review_description: The only thing was it was a little confusing how too play but I was stuck and could not figure it out so the sounds were creepy but I hope you explain how too play the game would be great look forward on buying the full version  thanks lots of scary the crap out of me fun keep them coming

developer_response.body:
Hi Rambo, how are you doing!? Happy new year!
You must look to where you want to got/interact and touch the side of your gearvr! The game's idea is to explore the room and solve puzzles to get out of there, the demo version has a time limit and some puzzles limits. Thank you for your review!

reviews.review_description: Love it! Hard, fun and creepy at the same time.
Thank you for demo play which leaded into purchase it after experience :)

developer_response.body: Thanks man! Hope you like it as much as you have liked the Demo! Just let us know what you think about the full experience.

reviews.review_description: Can someone tell me but whether I should pull the level then I can't get past the first level

developer_response.body: Hi Kid, happy new year! This is a demo version, with limited time and limited puzzles. You can solve some puzzles, but in order to escape the room you must get the full version (0.99usd right now).

reviews.review_description: Looks like the demo has a timer,  but I manage to solve some puzzles and even change my size!

I always loved escape games and ever since I started to hear about VR I wondered how it would be to play a game like that with that much immersion. The Rabbit Hole delivers it. It's the best experience I've had on the Gear VR so far, I totally recommend the full game.
Good but The Hospital: Allison's Diary and Affected the Manor are the best out there.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! I am not sure if we aim to do the same thing they do, and the full version sure goes longer than this demo. Besides we plan to release more levels as soon as we can!

reviews.review_description: I love escape the room games and this was awesome! Really creepy and challenging. Loved the game design. I'm going to buy the full version now!
I had many problem with the controls and finding the right angle to interact with objects but apart from that beautiful. Unfortunately the demo was to short for me to book any progress�

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback man, we are uploading a new version with support for the Motion controller. When it is on, you will be able to use it as a hand, much better to interact with it! Thanks for the compliments!

reviews.review_description: Click and grab,but go to menu, again and again. Is it bug? No moving, just look around, 3drawer and radio is flicking. But I grab something in the drawer, nothing happen. What should I do? Oh~ f~!

developer_response.body: Disable Bluetooth or any Motion Controller and you will be able to play it using the trackpad! Update: We've fixed it. If you're still interested, everything should be working now. And, if you like it, please reconsider your review, it is very important for us.

reviews.review_description: The game very good but the control vr does not work if you can fix it please

developer_response.body: Hi Cindy, are you talking about the motion controller or a gamepad? Please send us an email so we can fix it for you!

reviews.review_description: The sounds are great, make the game really creepy
I solved the Lights Out puzzle and a ghost flew out at me.

developer_response.body: Hi Jim, happy new year! This is a limitation of the demo version, in the full version you get to keep playing and can leave the room! Hope you have enjoyed!

reviews.review_description: Will crash at title if xposed is installed.  Uninstall xposed before to play!

developer_response.body:
Have you tried to uninstall and reinstall?
We have tried into this model and has worked, we will be checking again! Thank you for your feedback!

reviews.review_title: Could not interact with items or puzzles
reviews.review_description: Could not move consistently. Tap to investigate items. Interact with puzzles. Difficult to look at items to create yellow halo for interaction, could not sustain, each tap resulted in menu screen. Uninstalled and reinstalled three times. Finally gave up. No available online instructions for trouble shooting?

developer_response.body:
Hi Alye, 
We got curious with your problems, you can reach us through email or facebook. The interactions should be working ok, are you playing with a controller? Have you turned on the comfort mode? Double tab open the menu, to interact is a single tap. Please enter in contact with us so we can help you

reviews.review_description: Paid for update to full game but I’ve still only got the demo version!! Don’t know how to resolve this
